<!-- WARNING: This section is autogenerated - changes will be overwritten when regenerated by https://github.com/microsoft/fde-mgmt -->
## Developer Setup

Follow the instructions in the [getting started Wiki](https://github.com/microsoft/fde-core/wiki/Onboarding-&-Getting-Started).

## Repository Managed by Microsoft Forward-Deployed Engineering (FDE)

This repository is maintained by Microsoft's forward-deployed engineering group. The FDE platform makes several assumptions about the layout and configuration of this repository:

### `infra/`

It is expected that you have a Pulumi project located at `infra/app`. See [`infra/README.md`](infra/README.md).

### `py/`

It is expected that you have a [uv workspace](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/concepts/projects/workspaces) located at `py/`.

### `ts/`

It is expected that you have a [pnpm workspace](https://pnpm.io/workspaces) located at `ts/`.

### Common Libraries

For each of the folders above, the `common` subdirectory is reserved for common libraries synced from the [`microsoft/fde-core`](https://github.com/microsoft/fde-core) repository:

```
infra/
  common/
    libs/    # <--- Common libs synced from fde-core
  libs/      # <--- Your libs
    my-lib-a/
    my-lib-b/
  app/       # <--- Your project's Pulumi program
py/
  common/
    libs/     # <--- Common libs synced from fde-core
    apps/     # <--- Common apps synced from fde-core
  libs/       # <--- Your libs
    my-lib-a/
    my-lib-b/
  apps/       # <--- Your apps
    my-app-x/
    my-app-y/
ts/
  common/
    libs/     # <--- Common libs synced from fde-core
    apps/     # <--- Common apps synced from fde-core
  libs/       # <--- Your libs
    my-lib-a/
    my-lib-b/
  apps/       # <--- Your apps
    my-app-x/
    my-app-y/
```

To subscribe to these libraries, update the dependencies list in your [`.github/fde-config.yml`](.github/fde-config.yml) file.
For example, to subscribe to the Python `fastapi` library:

**`.github/fde-config.yml`**
```yaml
dependencies:
  - type: directory
    repo: fde-core
    path: py/common/libs/fastapi
```

Much like Dependabot, the `microsoft-fde-bot` GitHub App will regularly open pull requests to sync your declared dependencies into your repository.

See [.github/fde-config-docs](/.github/fde-config-docs/README.md) for the full documentation on this YAML file.

### `.pre-commit-config.yaml`

All FDE repositories are expected to have a [`.pre-commit-config.yaml`](.pre-commit-config.yaml) file at the root.
The checks declared in this file are enforced in pull request builds.
Developers can optionally install these checks as pre-commit hooks to get earlier feedback on any linting or formatting errors:

```bash
uvx pre-commit install
```

To run the checks manually:

```bash
uvx pre-commit run --all-files
```
